name: 27) Massaman Curry
method: Chopped palm sugar - 3 tablespoons
Chopped palm sugar - 3 tablespoons
Cut the beef from the bone and, if necessary, cut it into large cubes.
Cut the beef from the bone and, if necessary, cut it into large cubes.

In a heavy bottomed pan over medium heat, add enough oil to cover the bottom, then fry the beef in the oil until fully browned on both sides. Do this in batches as needed. Try not to overcrowd the pan

In a heavy bottomed pan over medium heat, add enough oil to cover the bottom, then fry the beef in the oil until fully browned on both sides. Do this in batches as needed. Try not to overcrowd the pan
Add ½ cup coconut milk and water until everything is submerged.
Add ½ cup coconut milk and water until everything is submerged.
Add 1 tablespoon of curry paste and 1 tablespoon of fish sauce and let it simmer for 2 - 2 ½ hours.
Add 1 tablespoon of curry paste and 1 tablespoon of fish sauce and let it simmer for 2 - 2 ½ hours.
In a second heavy-bottomed pot, add about ¾ cup of the remaining coconut milk and bring to a boil. Let it boil until it reduces by half and the coconut milk thickens.
In a second heavy-bottomed pot, add about ¾ cup of the remaining coconut milk and bring to a boil. Let it boil until it reduces by half and the coconut milk thickens.
Add the rest of the curry paste into the coconut milk (Step 6) over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the coconut oil separates from the curry paste.
Add the rest of the curry paste into the coconut milk (Step 6) over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the coconut oil separates from the curry paste.
Add the remaining coconut milk. Stir well until it dissolves. Add 1 teaspoon of tamarind, palm sugar, and fish sauce.
Add the remaining coconut milk. Stir well until it dissolves. Add 1 teaspoon of tamarind, palm sugar, and fish sauce.
Add the onions, potatoes, and peanuts to the curry (Step 9).
Add the onions, potatoes, and peanuts to the curry (Step 9).
Simmer the curry for 10-15 minutes.
Simmer the curry for 10-15 minutes.
